channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Anysphere launches Cursor for iOS, letting developers run always-on cloud agents and manage desktop agents remotely
item.description: The mobile app supports voice dictation for background code generation
item.content:encoded:
The mobile app supports voice dictation for background code generation

Original source: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cursor/id6767085653

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/vjioabgl

Anysphere has shipped a native iOS app that puts Cursor's AI coding agents in developers' pockets, letting them spin up always-on cloud agents or reach out to desktop agents from anywhere. The release adds voice dictation so spoken ideas can trigger background code work, along with tools to review diffs, merge PRs, and annotate screenshots while the agents keep running. 2.5K 23.2K 1.7K 4.6K 6.1M EZ #1911 | @ERICZAKARIASSON BR #1861 | @BRIANROEMMELE RL #1733 | @RYOLU_ HH #1682 | @HAMELHUSAIN ND #1653 | @NICKADOBOS CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS SO #1349 | @SOLEIO T- #1325 | @THEO SW #1092 | @SJWHITMORE TS #1050 | @TIMSWEENEYEPIC MM #716 | @MASCOBOT B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS MA #315 | @MARTIN_CASADO EM #52 | @ELONMUSK

  • Views: 2,946,116
  • Likes: 14,109
  • Bookmarks: 2,164
  • Quotes: 83
  • Replies: 1,088
  • Posts: 19

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • martin_casado
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Marco Mascorro
  • Tim Sweeney

item.title: Meta AI open-sources Brain2Qwerty v2, a non-invasive brain-to-text decoder achieving 61% word accuracy
item.description: It transitions from character decoding to full-sentence semantic decoding.
item.content:encoded:
It transitions from character decoding to full-sentence semantic decoding.

Original source: https://ai.meta.com/blog/brain2qwerty-brain-ai-human-communication/?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=video&utm_campaign=brain2qwertyv2

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/bs3l55vn

Meta just dropped the full code for Brain2Qwerty v2, turning raw MEG and EEG signals from people typing memorized sentences into real-time decoded text at the word and semantic level. The pipeline stacks a convolutional encoder with a transformer and character-level language model, lifting average word accuracy to 61 percent on data from nine volunteers and letting the best cases hit 78 percent with at most one error per sentence. 2K 20.7K 569 9.4K 5.5M BR #1861 | @BRIANROEMMELE XL #1855 | @XLR8HARDER CB #1428 | @CHRISJBAKKE CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS CS #1057 | @CSHORTEN30 AM #1027 | @ADAMMARBLESTONE ZN #983 | @ZACHARYNADO DF #756 | @DANIELLEFONG EL #684 | @OMARSAR0 TM #613 | @ISCIENCELUVR B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS PH #448 | @PDHSU AM #437 | @ANJNEYMIDHA AW #74 | @ALEXANDR_WANG

  • Views: 333,196
  • Likes: 2,918
  • Bookmarks: 702
  • Quotes: 12
  • Replies: 130
  • Posts: 39

Top authors

  • Alexandr Wang
  • Anjney Midha
  • Patrick Hsu
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Tanishq Mathew Abraham, Ph.D.

item.title: Meituan releases LongCat-2.0, a 1.6-trillion-parameter MoE model trained on 50,000 domestic Chinese ASICs
item.description: The model supports a 1-million-token context window.
item.content:encoded:
The model supports a 1-million-token context window.

Original source: https://longcat.chat/blog/longcat-2.0/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/va380veu

  • Views: 46,482
  • Likes: 492
  • Bookmarks: 143
  • Quotes: 6
  • Replies: 36
  • Posts: 27

item.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei argues open-source AI cannot be monitored, revoked, or patched for safety after release
item.description: The clip reignited debate over open-source AI safety risks
item.content:encoded:
The clip reignited debate over open-source AI safety risks

Original source: https://x.com/ramez/status/2071616710839521281

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/zx1bqifo

A 2023 Senate testimony clip from Anthropic's Dario Amodei has resurfaced to sharpen the divide over open-source AI, stressing that once frontier models escape controlled environments the original developers lose any practical way to watch for abuse, pull them back, or push safety fixes. 815 43.3K 1.9K 1.8K 1.4M RN #1992 | @RAMEZ BR #1861 | @BRIANROEMMELE CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI ME #861 | @MERVENOYANN B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS KA #403 | @YACINEMTB RA #218 | @AGARWL_

  • Views: 176,835
  • Likes: 1,495
  • Bookmarks: 142
  • Quotes: 22
  • Replies: 159
  • Posts: 17

Top authors

  • Rishabh Agarwal
  • kache
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • merve
  • Rohan Paul

item.title: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth appoints Marc Andreessen and Blake Masters to new Defense Policy Board
item.description: Ambassador Robert Lighthizer will chair the advisory board.
item.content:encoded:
Ambassador Robert Lighthizer will chair the advisory board.

Original source: https://www.war.gov/News/Releases/Release/Article/4528780/department-of-war-establishes-new-defense-policy-board/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/9y5ypxtg

Secretary of War Pete Hegseth has named Marc Andreessen and Blake Masters among thirteen appointees to the revived Defense Policy Board, an advisory panel first formed in 1985 that reports directly to the Secretary, Deputy Secretary, and Under Secretary for Policy on matters of strategy and national security. 599 4.9K 417 764 653.8K CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ BT #593 | @TUNGUZ B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS KA #403 | @YACINEMTB SU #361 | @SUHAIL

  • Views: 651,546
  • Likes: 4,816
  • Bookmarks: 763
  • Quotes: 204
  • Replies: 388
  • Posts: 10

Top authors

  • Suhail
  • kache
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Andrew Curran

item.title: Former Meta PM Xiaoyin Qu predicts US and European enterprises will adopt Chinese AI models to self-host on private GPUs
item.description: Qu cites enterprise distrust of Anthropic's data retention policies
item.content:encoded:
Qu cites enterprise distrust of Anthropic's data retention policies

Original source: https://x.com/xlr8harder/status/2071539689115267148

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/189tymuk

A former Meta product manager argues that US and European companies will move toward Chinese AI models specifically so they can run them on their own GPUs, gaining direct control over data and the chance to fine-tune on internal datasets for competitive edges. 168 2.7K 277 1.1K 487.2K XL #1855 | @XLR8HARDER ZE #1695 | @ZEPHYR_Z9 AD #1537 | @DORIALEXANDER RO #1315 | @KRISHNANROHIT RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI XJ #830 | @_XJDR

  • Views: 483,230
  • Likes: 2,718
  • Bookmarks: 1,111
  • Quotes: 25
  • Replies: 141
  • Posts: 13

Top authors

  • xjdr
  • Rohan Paul
  • rohit
  • Alexander Doria
  • Zephyr

item.title: Meta restricts employees from using Claude Code and OpenAI Codex to prevent competitor model distillation
item.description: The policy protects the training pipeline of Meta's upcoming MetaCode.
item.content:encoded:
The policy protects the training pipeline of Meta's upcoming MetaCode.

Original source: https://www.theinformation.com/articles/internal-docs-show-meta-putting-limits-claude-codex-fearing-distillation?rc=bfliih

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/84bk7m29

Meta is restricting employee access to Anthropic’s Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex while building its internal coding model, MetaCode, to stop outputs from those tools from slipping into its training data or evaluations. 174 1.4K 92 336 180.8K XL #1855 | @XLR8HARDER AD #1537 | @DORIALEXANDER CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS RP #1257 | @ROHANPAUL_AI AC #682 | @ANDREWCURRAN_ B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS SW #201 | @SIMONW

  • Views: 168,184
  • Likes: 1,350
  • Bookmarks: 314
  • Quotes: 27
  • Replies: 137
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • Simon Willison
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Rohan Paul
  • Chubby♨️

item.title: Kim Isenberg and Peter Wang argue the US is losing the AI race due to energy and data center constraints
item.description: China uses free models to promote domestic Huawei hardware.
item.content:encoded:
China uses free models to promote domestic Huawei hardware.

Original source: https://x.com/davidlee/status/2071609936329760769

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/3baroum6

Analysts Kim Isenberg and Peter Wang frame America's AI lag as a direct result of stalled data center construction and electricity grid limits, contrasting this with China's rapid rollout of models that favor domestic Huawei chips and infrastructure. 226 2.1K 259 1K 371.9K DA #1469 | @DAVIDLEE CH #1360 | @KIMMONISMUS SB #289 | @BLANCHEMINERVA AL #195 | @LEVIE GT #121 | @GARRYTAN

  • Views: 358,049
  • Likes: 1,999
  • Bookmarks: 1,003
  • Quotes: 54
  • Replies: 167
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Garry Tan
  • Aaron Levie
  • Stella Biderman
  • Chubby♨️
  • davidlee

item.title: Tesla releases FSD v14 Lite, bringing distilled AI4 driving models to memory-constrained AI3 hardware
item.description: Older AI3 computers operate with 15% of AI4's memory bandwidth
item.content:encoded:
Older AI3 computers operate with 15% of AI4's memory bandwidth

Original source: https://x.com/aelluswamy/status/2071487485172134131

item.content:encoded:
